title: Mailchimp vs Moosend (2025): Which Is Better?
meta_description: Compare Mailchimp and Moosend email marketing platforms. See pricing, features, and ratings to find the best fit for your business.
intro: Mailchimp and Moosend are two popular email marketing platforms that both offer freemium pricing models, but they cater to different business needs. This comparison examines their pricing, features, and user satisfaction to help you choose the right tool for your email marketing campaigns.
choose_a_if: You're building an ecommerce store and want integrated shopping features
You need a well-established platform with a large community and extensive documentation
You value brand recognition and want to work with the most widely-known email marketing tool
choose_b_if: You want unlimited emails on the free plan without restrictions
You're budget-conscious and need affordable automation workflows starting at $9/month
You prioritize user satisfaction ratings and positive customer reviews

faq.a: Neither is objectively better—it depends on your priorities. Mailchimp excels for ecommerce integration and brand recognition, while Moosend offers better value with unlimited free emails and lower paid pricing. Moosend also has significantly higher user satisfaction ratings on both G2 and Trustpilot.

faq.q: Which is cheaper, Mailchimp or Moosend?
faq.a: Moosend is cheaper overall. Its paid plans start at $9/month compared to Mailchimp's $13/month, and Moosend offers unlimited emails on the free tier while Mailchimp limits free accounts. For budget-conscious businesses, Moosend provides better value.

faq.q: Can I switch from Moosend to Mailchimp?
faq.a: Yes, both platforms support exporting and importing subscriber lists, making migration relatively straightforward. Most email marketing platforms allow CSV exports of your contacts, so you can transfer your audience between tools. Plan the migration carefully to maintain your email schedules and automation workflows.
